required_tools.reason: All projects use GitHub for source control, CI/CD, and code review. Required for PR automation, code review, and deployment triggers.
Kubernetes is the core infrastructure for all services, and operators (e.g., Cilium, CNPG, Opstree) are referenced in tasks. Required for provisioning, deployment, and management of all workloads.
ArgoCD is used for GitOps deployment and automated sync/rollback of all services. Required for continuous delivery and health monitoring.
CloudNative-PG PostgreSQL clusters are provisioned and used by all backend services (catalog, rms, finance, vetting, social). Required for schema migrations, health checks, and data access.
Valkey (Redis-compatible) is provisioned and used for caching, rate limiting, and background tasks by all backend services. Required for connection checks, cache management, and rate limiter setup.

Cloudflare R2 is used for object storage (media, WAL archival), and Cloudflare Tunnel is used for ingress and secure external access. Required for bucket provisioning, endpoint management, and tunnel configuration.
Signal-CLI is deployed as a pod and integrated for approval workflows, notifications, and Morgan agent messaging. Required for Signal registration, message relay, and webhook handling.
Morgan AI agent is deployed on OpenClaw, which orchestrates all MCP tools, skills, and adapters (Signal, ElevenLabs, web chat). Required for agent configuration, tool routing, and skill management.

recommended_tools.reason: Prometheus is referenced for metrics collection and alerting in all backend services and infrastructure. While not strictly required for deployment, it is highly recommended for SLO validation, alerting, and dashboarding.
Loki is referenced for log aggregation and alerting (e.g., secret rotation reminders, ArgoCD sync failures). Recommended for centralized log management and compliance.
Grafana is referenced for dashboarding and visualization of Prometheus metrics. Recommended for observability and SLO monitoring.
